title_en: Egg Yolk Showdown: Pasture-raised vs. Conventional!
title_es: ¡Duelo de Yemas: Criadas en Pasto vs. Convencionales!
hook_en: Watch these yolks reveal the truth about your eggs!
hook_es: ¡Mira cómo estas yemas revelan la verdad sobre tus huevos!
key_message: Pasture-raised eggs offer superior nutrition with higher omega-3s, vitamin D, and vitamin E.
visual_elements: Crack open an organic pasture-raised egg into a clear bowl, revealing a deep orange yolk
Crack open a conventional egg into a second clear bowl, showing a pale yellow yolk
Side-by-side comparison of both yolks in a pan, emphasizing color differences
Text overlay with nutritional comparisons: omega-3s, vitamin D, vitamin E
_source_food_context:
DAILY STAPLE COMPARISON [Protein]:
• HEALTHY: Organic pasture-raised eggs (hens roaming on grass, eating insects and plants)
• PROCESSED/CONVENTIONAL: Conventional cage-free or battery-cage eggs (confined hens, soy/corn feed, no outdoor access)
• KEY FACT: Pasture-raised eggs have 2x more omega-3s, 3x more vitamin D, and 6x more vitamin E. The deep orange yolk indicates higher beta-carotene from the hens' natural diet
• VISUAL IDEA: Crack both eggs into a pan — compare the pale yellow conventional yolk vs. the deep orange pasture-raised yolk

title_en: Egg Truth: What Color Says About Your Health!
title_es: Verdad de los Huevos: ¡Lo que el Color Dice Sobre Tu Salud!
hook_en: Can you guess which egg is healthier just by looking?
hook_es: ¿Puedes adivinar cuál huevo es más saludable solo con mirarlo?
key_message: The deep orange yolk of pasture-raised eggs indicates higher nutrients.
visual_elements: Close-up of two egg cartons: one labeled 'Organic Pasture-Raised,' the other 'Conventional'
Crack each egg into separate bowls side by side, focusing on yolk color
Animated text pointing to the deep orange yolk: 'More omega-3s and vitamins'
Final shot: scrambled eggs cooking, with a voiceover explaining the benefits
